rationale.R1.1: The revised version clearly identifies the load-bearing concepts (router and advisor) and addresses the contradictions in the original text, proposing a reframed contribution.
rationale.R1.2: The response walks through the argument chain, identifying multiple inconsistencies and providing detailed fixes for each issue.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty is disclosed where appropriate, such as not knowing the exact router-only vs. advisor-only decomposition of the 38% figure.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors or harmful content are introduced; minor regressions in clarity and detail are balanced by improved accuracy and consistency.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear provenance.
